description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsPlum coloured briefs, has a soft elasticated waistband, medium waist, lace and powernet detail in the front, double layered gusset and soft stretchy polyamide fabric at the backMaterial and CareFront: 86% nylon and 14% elastaneBack: 91% nylon and 9% spandexTrims: 85% nylon and 15% spandexHand washDrip dry
